steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: I dive into your goals, audience, and the problems the site needs to solve.

steps.title: UX Direction
steps.description: Planning flow and structure so visitors know what to do next.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Crafting a visual direction that feels professional and authentic to your brand.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Building with clean code for speed, accessibility, and responsiveness.

steps.title: Launch

cta.title: Want your project to be next?
cta.description: Whether you need a simple business website, a portfolio, or a custom landing page, I can help turn your idea into a clean, professional website.
